name: Crackling Cornbread Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the ingredients in a large bowl until just mixed.
2. Preheat two greased muffin pans in a 400 degree (200 degrees Celsius) oven for 3 minutes or until very hot.
3. Pour the batter into the hot muffin pans, filling them about 2/3 full.
4. Bake at 350 degrees (175 degrees Celsius) for 30 minutes or until golden brown.
